subject: Support addition of scalar type constraints
commit_message:
Support addition of scalar type constraints

this also supports the addition of
the in_range and the valid_values constraints,
and supports delete and editing of current and
added constraints

Issue-ID: SDC-4223
Change-Id: I5ffb4d17d9f8c2730f650153fb4ff89eccfdd474
Signed-off-by: JvD_Ericsson <jeff.van.dam@est.tech>

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-2

Im seeing the following issues testing:
1. A constraint with operand 'equal' and no value is displayed at the end of the list of existing constraints, presumably for adding another constraint - this should only be displayed after a user selected the "Add" button
2. Adding a value in the constraint described in 1. above and clicking save does not seem to do anything
3. Selecting the drop down list for the operands shows some of the operands as disabled, including the default selection of "equal"
4. Only length, min_length, max_length, pattern seem to be enabled regardless of the type of the property 
5. Adding a new property with a constraint - the constraint seems to be lost
